channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-21
item.description:
Our open-source research community has been buzzing with activity lately. Notably, the `scienceverse/metacheck` project has made significant progress with the addition of JAPS (Journal Article Publishing System) to jamovi in its `data_check` branch, thanks to contributions from Lakens. Meanwhile, the `marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing` project has seen improvements to its master branch, with Alex O. Holcombe refining the wording and italicizing testimonials for emphasis. It's exciting to see these projects evolve and improve, and we celebrate the collaborative spirit that drives our community forward. As our tools and platforms continue to develop, we're eager to explore potential connections and synergies between projects like metacheck and tenzing, and to see how they can support each other in advancing open-source research. With ongoing updates and refinements, our community is poised for even more exciting developments in the days to come.

21 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub8 commits
tenzing7 commits
metacheck6 commits

item.title: oddpub: 1 commit today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The main branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The ontogenerator's code validation was updated on July 21, as stated in the commit message "ontogenerator: code validation update". Earlier, on July 17, the ontogenerator's version number was incremented to 7.3.0, and the Zenodo badge was updated, with a separate commit also adding a Zenodo badge, and another commit updating it. The README file was also touched up on July 17, with the commit message "ontogenerator: README touchup", and the documentation was updated with a keyword cleanup, as described in the commit "ontogenerator: Documentation update, keyword cleanup". Additionally, the commit "ontogenerator: Updated Zenodo badge" further modified the Zenodo badge.

1 commit(s) today:

  • ceb9a9d [main] code validation update — ontogenerator

View all commits →
